title: eryngium serra
intro: Eryngium serra, also known as the saw-leaved eryngium or sea holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eryngium serra are thought to include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Eryngium serra is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
